ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project owner */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, inactive, archived) */,
  "project_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the project (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the project was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the project was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the task belongs to */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the task */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the task */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the task (e.g., To-Do, In Progress, Done) */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the task */,
  "sprint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sprint the task belongs to */,
  "task_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the task (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "task_type" TEXT /* Type of the task (e.g., feature, bug, chore) */,
  "estimated_hours" INTEGER /* Estimated time required to complete the task */,
  "actual_hours" INTEGER /* Actual time spent on the task */,
  "percentage_completed" TEXT /* Progress of the task (in percentage) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the task was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the task was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_sprint_id FOREIGN KEY ("sprint_id") REFERENCES sprints ("sprint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sprints" (
  "sprint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sprint */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the sprint belongs to */,
  "sprint_name" TEXT /* Name of the sprint */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the sprint */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the sprint */,
  "sprint_status" TEXT /* Status of the sprint (e.g., active, inactive, archived) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the sprint was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the sprint was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sprint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., project manager, team member, stakeholder) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the user was last modified */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task assignment */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the task */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the task */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the task was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_assignments_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment text */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of the comment (e.g., issue, feature request, question) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_comments_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification (e.g., task assignment, task update, comment) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "integration_type" TEXT /* Type of the integration (e.g., Slack, GitHub) */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for the integration */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the integration was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id")
)
